item.title: Images of Note: Heroin again
item.description:
AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
do it
yeah, no. I can't wait for some small indie studio to make something better
The wrath of a God that will not forgive you? Isn't that just the Phantom?
Hate. Hate it. Jail.
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging http://bsky.abbii.gay: For Bluesky http://onlyfans.abbii.gay: for Tips!

item.title: What Happened Today #70
item.description: Trump’s return isn’t a campaign, but a hostile occupation of government. Generals leapfrogged. Ambassadors purged. Scientists replaced with conspiracy theorists. Dissenters, from Space Force to Columbia, silenced or surveilled. Autocrats don’t just rewrite the rules — they erase the referees. And this time, the purge is wearing a badge, holding a gavel, and calling it policy. Fight back. Call your reps. Use 5 Calls. Hit Resistbot. Show up for events you find on Mobilize. Subscribe free at https://govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://defensescoop.com/2025/04/11/dan-caine-chairman-joint-chiefs-trump-military-adviser/ 2. https://www.cnbc.com/2025/04/11/china-strikes-back-with-125percent-tariffs-on-us-goods-starting-april-12.html 3. https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2025/apr/10/supreme-court-order-el-salvador 4. https://apnews.com/article/living-immigrants-dead-social-security-numbers-trump-c10737cbe36e3108fb244a555777d880 5. https://www.msn.com/en-us/money/markets/u-s-budget-deficit-widens-to-1-3-trillion-in-first-half-of-fiscal-2025/ar-AA1CGQXU 6. https://www.cbsnews.com/news/marjorie-taylor-greene-stocks-trump-tariffs/ 7. https://abc7news.com/post/da-charges-12-stanford-pro-palestinian-protesters-felonies-vandalism-trespassing/16154711/ 8. https://www.axios.com/2025/04/10/mahmoud-khalil-evidence-marco-rubio 9. https://www.politico.com/news/2025/04/10/us-ukraine-ambassador-resign-033340 10. https://www.miamiherald.com/news/local/immigration/article303959946.html 11. https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/politics/2025/04/10/atf-deputy-forced-out-kash-patel/83024988007/ 12. https://www.cpr.org/2025/04/10/sgamma-withdraws-bureau-of-land-management-nomination/ 13. https://www.msn.com/en-us/news/politics/trump-administration-wants-to-install-federal-oversight-of-columbia-university/ar-AA1CGRkZ 14. https://www.newsweek.com/donald-trump-accuses-mexico-stealing-water-texas-2058389 15. https://www.nytimes.com/2025/04/10/arts/trump-garden-heroes-humanities.html 16. https://thehill.com/policy/healthcare/5243587-autism-vaccine-epidemic/ 17. https://www.mediaite.com/politics/space-force-colonel-removed-after-disavowing-jd-vances-comments-about-acquiring-greenland/

item.title: Rejected Cartoons
item.description:
Welcome to another round of cartoons we submitted to the New Yorker but were rejected.
Ok, we didn't even submitted the last three ones because we were too tired to wait for their answer. But still – the New Yorker is the toughest door in the life of a cartoonist and we won't rest until we get in! xx Elizabeth and Jonathan
item.dc:creator: Warandpeasofficial

item.dc:creator: exploradoresciclos2018

item.title: One of the most meaningful court decisions you never heard of
item.description: If you ever wonder why companies get worse over time, you know the “shitification” of our economy. Well, this ruling is a major contributor. While not legally binding (everywhere) this ruling became the overall legal consensus on ShareHolder rights. A company MUST operate in the interest of maximizing revenue and profit even at the cost of society, workers, the planet. Shareholders have become the single most important thing in our economy. The fact is, Shareholders do represent a stakeholder in those businesses and their interests should be heard but workers are stakeholders, customers, neighbours and with multi nationals you can count the whole population as a stakeholder. All stakeholders should be considered, and long term sustainability should be prioritized over short term stock growth.
item.dc:creator: McKittyNuts

.
.
.
.
Friends from work tax
This my best friend
It’s been beautiful out lately
Turbo puppies
Fetch is life
Almost went into the puddle myself that time hahahaha
puppy dog eyes don’t work on me… in the tub little lady
Happies dude in the world
Silly friends
Fam group
Sometimes a grumbly werewolf just needs to be hand fed

item.title: Finely Tuned Friday MEME DUMP To Make You Exhale Through Your Nostrils #412
item.description:
1. One of the biggest L takes I've ever heard (1/2)
2. One of the biggest L takes I've ever heard (2/2)
3. To be fair to my man, that body is holy
4. When Skynet takes over a Turkish kebab shop
5. "Oh shit, she ded, okay byeeeee..."
6. Dad uses this April Fool's Day to prank his daughters into believing school had just reopened
7
8. Wait...
9.
10
11. Johnny Carson trolling Myrtle Young the world renown potato chip collector.
12. PEAR PRESSURE!
13. The other day this guy on our team had 0 kills and 3 deaths and he was like "EZ" at the end of the match...
14. Good to see that a company is finally listening to its customers!
15. Um... 5 days until my game releases! It's comedic narrative game called: Do Not Press The Button (Or You'll Delete The Multiverse) If you are into these types of game please consider a wishlist : ) https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_Or_Youll_Delete_The_Multiverse/
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Look at those little teeth!
item.description: Now, I'm going to have to add a donkey to my list of farm animals that I tell myself I'll have someday, but everyone knows that I won't. Edit: I did not expect some of these responses and am just dying laughing! I found the thirsty group, lmao.
item.dc:creator: FatCatStamp

item.title: The Dark Times
item.description: We well respected professor of both history and political science, someone I admire and respect greately, has been outspoken on the things being done by the Republicans, the Trump administration, and SCOTUS that are not only violations of the Constitution but also correlate to behaviors of fascist states, discovered that they are on a Department of Homeland Security Professor watchlist. Yes, DHS has created a watch list of professors and intellectuals that oppose the current views of the administration. Every student of history has seen this before. We all know what happens next. We are watching it in real time. If you ever wondered what you'd do if you lived during the rise of Nazi-ism in Germany what you're doing now is it. This is that moment. Your actions and words matter.
item.dc:creator: dogboybastard

item.title: #119 (recycled) memes

item.title: I've been wearing anti Trump shirts to the VA for all my appointments lately
item.description: And it has actually given me more faith for the future! I had appointments every day this week because my body is a wreck after the Navy. Every single time I go, I've been wearing various political shirts. Examples: "Veterans against Trump" "All gave some, some gave all. One had bone spurs. Veterans against Trump" "I'm a veteran, not a sucker or loser, I swore to defend the constitution" "TRUMP IS A TRAITOR" Yes, I know it's kinda cringe and boot. But I've been wearing them for a reason. I live in Texas and I'm tired of people thinking that all vets are Trumpers. I don't care if I'm cringe or boot, I wear these so other people can see that some of us will speak against this shit. Every single day, at least 2 veterans have told me that they agree, given me high fives, told me they loved my shirt, etc. Multiple staff members have as well! My prosthetisist and my psychiatrist have both said that they wish they could wear things like that or express their opinions that openly. I've had nurses, doctors, and admin all tell me that they love it. I've watched them read my shirts and smile, and treat me me much more warmly. My psych told me that she loves seeing how I'm so willing to stand up for what I believe- and it's just a shirt! But it's a shirt in a veteran hospital, in a red state, and I'm a transgender gay man so I have more of a target on me. And NO ONE HAS SAID SHIT! Sure, I've seen plenty of people read my shirt, purse their lips, glare at me. None of them have said a damn word. Literally nothing verbally negative. Not a single staff member has done any of that btw, only vets and civilians when I go to Walmart or whatever after the VA. Zero negative reactions from VA staff - obviously if they disagree they can't say anything, but I'm talking about not even any negative body language, and I've been watching for it whenever people read the shirts. Today I'm wearing a bright red shirt, with all white caps lettering saying TRUMP IS A TRAITOR. I've been at the VA for 4 hours so far and I've gotten 2 high fives, 4 knuckle bumps, and a fucking hug, which I absolutely loved seeing that level of agreement! I know it's just a shirt. But it's something. And the veterans who's faces light up when they see the shirts, who go "I'm not alone! Other vets hate this too!" I'm gonna keep doing this and wearing these shirts. My sign at the protest last Saturday is the last pic
item.dc:creator: diegosgotpack127001

item.title: When you remember something embarrassing from 3,000 years ago.
item.description: Printed in resin, painted with love (and maybe a little existential dread). The wings were the real challenge — turns out even tiny demons are picky about their angles. 100% 3D printed, 0% remorse.
item.dc:creator: ValravenFR

item.title: Friday vibes
item.description: Common side effects
item.dc:creator: MyNameGifOreilly

item.title: Stop Destroying Videogames
item.description: Hi everyone! I resurrected this account to inform you about this initiative. We still need a few signatures all around EU. Don't think this is not important if you aren't from the EU. This might change stuff globally! Deadline is approaching fast and there still some signatures missing. Don't let them kill our beloved games. Objectives: This initiative calls to require publishers that sell or license videogames to consumers in the European Union (or related features and assets sold for videogames they operate) to leave said videogames in a functional (playable) state. Specifically, the initiative seeks to prevent the remote disabling of videogames by the publishers, before providing reasonable means to continue functioning of said videogames without the involvement from the side of the publisher. [...] https://citizens-initiative.europa.eu/initiatives/details/2024/000007_en That's all Have a nice weekend everybody
item.dc:creator: egix

item.title: It was an amazing feeling!
item.description: I know it sounds silly, but my love language is touch and emotion, and holding hands means a lot to me. I've been alone for so long, I'd almost forgot what it was like to have another humans hand in mine. It's a W in my book. I hope this means that all the time I've spent working to heal from the past and be a better human is actually paying off. EDIT* Wow you guys are awesome! ❤️
item.dc:creator: DustyBibbles
